input: My card was charged twice this month, please refund the duplicate.

The app crashes every time I open the settings page.
The API returns a 500 error when I POST to /orders with a large payload.

Webhooks stopped firing after your last deployment.

Drag-and-drop reordering doesn't save its new order.

Two-factor SMS codes never get delivered to my phone.

The calendar view shows events on the wrong day after DST.
Exporting to Excel produces a file that won't open.
The login button is unresponsive on Firefox only.
API rate limiting returns 429 even when I'm well under the quota.
The image cropper saves a black rectangle instead of my photo.
Notifications duplicate themselves three times for one event.
The search index seems stale; new records take hours to appear.
The settings page resets all my toggles back to default on reload.
The mobile keyboard covers the input field so I can't see what I type.
Server-sent events disconnect every few seconds and reconnect.
The CSV upload fails with an encoding error on UTF-8 files.
The embedded widget shows a CORS error on my own domain.
Drag handles disappear when I zoom the browser past 125%.
The webhook signature validation fails on every legitimate request.
